enabled.description: When false, skip implicit Mantle discovery on startup. Defaults to undefined (auto-detect from credentials).

discovery.label: Model Discovery
discovery.help: Plugin-owned controls for Amazon Bedrock Mantle model auto-discovery.

discovery.enabled.label: Enable Discovery
discovery.enabled.help: When false, OpenClaw keeps the Amazon Bedrock Mantle plugin available but skips implicit startup discovery. When true, discovery can run even without AWS auth env markers.
